semantic.role: Vitest unit test suite for the ArchSpine repository bootstrap and managed file synchronization system.
responsibilities: Tests the synchronization of managed repository files (agent instructions, gitattributes, gitignore, search ignore, spine ignore) via sync* functions.
Validates the injection and removal of ArchSpine scripts in agent instructions files.
Verifies the removal of managed files (agent instructions, gitattributes, gitignore, search ignore, spine ignore) during cleanup.
Tests the full repository bootstrap workflow using runRepositoryBootstrap with a Config instance.
Isolates test state using temporary directories (os.tmpdir, fs.mkdtempSync) to prevent side effects.
Asserts correct file content, presence, and absence after synchronization and cleanup operations.
outOfScope: Does not test error handling or edge cases for invalid configurations.
Does not cover integration with external systems or real file system permissions.
Does not test performance or concurrency aspects of the synchronization system.
invariants: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (Rule: test-file-suffix).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide comprehensive test coverage for the repository bootstrap and managed file synchronization subsystem, ensuring idempotent sync operations and clean removal of managed artifacts.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: feat: tighten schema handling and add try preview — This test suite validates the synchronization logic that may be affected by schema changes, ensuring managed files are correctly written and removed.

English.role: Vitest unit test suite for the ArchSpine repository bootstrap and managed file synchronization system.
responsibilities: Tests the synchronization of managed repository files (agent instructions, gitattributes, gitignore, search ignore, spine ignore) via sync* functions.
Validates the injection and removal of ArchSpine scripts in agent instructions files.
Verifies the removal of managed files (agent instructions, gitattributes, gitignore, search ignore, spine ignore) during cleanup.
Tests the full repository bootstrap workflow using runRepositoryBootstrap with a Config instance.
Isolates test state using temporary directories (os.tmpdir, fs.mkdtempSync) to prevent side effects.

outOfScope: Does not test error handling or edge cases for invalid configurations.

Simplified Chinese.role: ArchSpine 仓库引导和托管文件同步系统的 Vitest 单元测试套件。
responsibilities: 测试通过 sync* 函数同步托管仓库文件（agent instructions、gitattributes、gitignore、search ignore、spine ignore）的功能。
验证在 agent instructions 文件中注入和移除 ArchSpine 脚本的操作。
验证清理过程中托管文件（agent instructions、gitattributes、gitignore、search ignore、spine ignore）的移除操作。
使用 runRepositoryBootstrap 和 Config 实例测试完整的仓库引导工作流程。
使用临时目录（os.tmpdir、fs.mkdtempSync）隔离测试状态，防止副作用。
断言同步和清理操作后文件的正确内容、存在状态和缺失状态。
outOfScope: 不测试无效配置的错误处理或边界情况。
不涵盖与外部系统的集成或真实文件系统权限。
不测试同步系统的性能或并发方面。
